3106810.name: Shades
3106810.description:
🔴 UPDATE December 2025 :

Hello ! Since I'm a solo developer working on Shades (without using any generative Ai unlike many game studios today...), and high quality games made by humans takes time, I'm sorry to announce you that the early access of Shades is reported to 2026 (Q1/Q2 hopefully), I prefer to take the time needed for my game, I hope you understand.
I wish you good holidays and a happy new year ! ❤️

Hello and welcome !

I'm Mamat, a true passionate gamer and a new French game developer on Unreal Engine 5, and I present to you my very first game : Shades !

These last few years many FPS were not really satisfying me, so I decided to make one by myself with all my ideas and my perspective of a truly immersive first-person game, which means immersive menus, no or minimum HUD or camera effects or pop up notifications or outlined/highlighted items and interactions, like in real life, and be really free to do whatever you want in dense and beautiful environments, no invisible walls, many destructions possible for example, using different ways to complete the objectives and find solutions to problems by yourself, no backseating, minimap or floating arrows/pings/compass, and with that all the latest hardware and software technologies available on PC to have the most realistic graphics and physics for the best immersion possible.

I'm making this game first to gain experience (so please be indulgent), and to start a portfolio in game development, then hopefully in the future to change from my actual job to my dream job : being a game developer, or even better, create my own game studio, which really listens its community and that you can trust and rely on, to make all our dream games for all of us, I have so many ideas !

So based on your support, I hope this early access will give me the time and resources to make all this happen.

About :

Shades is an indie game in solo FPS truly immersive (almost no HUD) with infiltration and tactical extraction shooter aspects. Go stealth, or loud, in a variety of missions as a mercenary for an agency that really uses your skills to make this world better.

Synopsis :

After a few years being one of the best in the Navy SEALs, you find out it doesn't fit your expectations to make the changes needed to make this world better. So you quit to take some time alone and think how you can achieve this goal. That is when a secret branch of an international agency contact you with a job offer and missions that would truly help get rid of the bad people on this planet for the greater good, by any means necessary.

For now the game may not be very optimized, so you will surely need a good and recent PC for the best experience (you can check the system requirements below), it may also lack some content and functionalities, so be aware of that before buying my early access game and then leaving a bad review please.

Currently implemented in the game, there are 6 different maps : the introduction map, two skill test maps, your first official mission, your secret training bunker to upgrade, and the agency training site. All the maps are handcrafted with homemade algorithms for procedurally generated spawns, loots, missions, enemies, weather, dynamic time of day, buildings, environments and more, to have beautiful detailed maps that are different on each mission. There is a stealth system with lootable enemies, a money/level system, a tablet/PC with online casino games, shops, applications, dark web markets and more, 10 customizable weapons : a sniper rifle, a revolver, 2 assault rifles, 2 SMGs, 2 shotguns, 2 handguns + 4 grenades : fragmentation, contact frag, flash and smoke, several utilities/explosives, an axe, fist fighting and a push/kick/ragdoll system. And for the early access launch, a supporter pack (at the same price of the game) with in reward an old-school realistic skin system.

All along the development of the game, I plan to get it better optimized and add more missions, more maps and environments, more weapons, explosives, utilities and gadgets, new mechanics, gameplays, more customizations on loadouts, many destruction possibilities and physical interactions, more complex and smarter enemies, and cool horror gamemodes/campaigns (with zombies or aliens, robots and more).

Since I'm new in game development and all by myself for now, I will take as much time as possible to read and consider a maximum of all your suggestions, bug reports and fixes to do, to improve my game and myself as much as possible.

So please I would very much appreciate if you have any good feedback to give me.

For that you have all my socials linked on the right of this page.

The game price will gradually increase as it develops, so the earlier you buy it, the more you will save !

At the early access launch, Shades will be only $2,99 !

This low price is because since it's the first game I develop, I know it will not be perfect from the start, so I want to reward all the players who supported me since the early development of the game, and also because I think all video games should be accessible for everyone, especially in these difficult times...

If you know content creators (or if you are one) that would be interested in my game, I can be contacted on my socials for a free key ! (Once my game is released).

See you on my Twitch/YouTube/Steam live streams or on my socials, and don't forget to follow all my socials for more about the game and the latest news or to support me and my work ❤️

Have fun ! Bye ! ✌🏼

Mamat

All the images and videos are captured in real-time gameplays without any modifications, so you see exactly what you would have playing Shades.
3106810.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语*, 意大利语*, 德语*, 西班牙语 - 西班牙*, 阿拉伯语*, 保加利亚语*, 捷克语*, 丹麦语*, 荷兰语*, 芬兰语*, 希腊语*, 匈牙利语*, 印度尼西亚语*, 日语*, 韩语*, 挪威语*, 波兰语*, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙*, 罗马尼亚语*, 俄语*, 简体中文*, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲*, 瑞典语*, 泰语*, 繁体中文*, 土耳其语*, 乌克兰语*, 越南语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
